creator: jadawin@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Thu, 28 Nov 2013, KATO Tsuguru wrote:

> jadawin@FreeBSD.org wrote:
>=20
> > Why do you define DOCS and EXAMPLES in OPTION and don't use it with
> > PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS and MEXAMPLES ?
>=20
> Because documentation about converting ports to support STAGEDIR
> advises us to do so.
>=20
> https://wiki.freebsd.org/ports/StageDir

If you let a choice with an option, you must have a difference in
Makefile. An option with no choice in installation is not an option.
Basically, a portlint -a raise an error in this case.

--=20
Philippe Aud=E9oud
